name: construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inconsistent compliance preparation causes potential fines and project delays. We automate checklist preparation instead of manual preparation of checklists and forms.
problem_solved: Difficulty in consistently preparing and submitting OSHA compliance checklists.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in consistently preparing and submitting OSHA compliance checklists.

one_liner: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects/month, inconsistent compliance preparation causes potential fines and project delays. We automate checklist preparation instead of manual preparation of checklists and forms.
